# Module map

## data-layer — 调后端的 API 客户端与数据 hooks
- Entry: `src/api/client.ts`
- Owns (prod): `src/api/**`
- Tests: `src/api/**/*.test.ts`, `test/api/**`
- Checks: `test`, `typecheck`
- Test touch: `required`
- Pitfall: 组件不直接 fetch，统一走这里

## ui — UI 组件与页面
- Entry: `src/components/index.ts`
- Owns (prod): `src/components/**`, `src/pages/**`
- Tests: `src/**/*.spec.tsx`, `e2e/**`
- Checks: `test`, `e2e`
- Test touch: `advisory`
